name: llm-wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge base plugin for Claude Code. Ingest sources, compile interconnected markdown wikis, query, lint, and generate outputs. No Obsidian needed.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-compiled knowledge base. Commands: /wiki (init/status), /wiki:ingest (URLs, files, text, inbox, tweets), /wiki:compile (raw to articles), /wiki:query (Q&A with citations), /wiki:search, /wiki:lint (health checks), /wiki:output (summaries, reports, slides).
